differences: The project surface uses the Dashboard v1.0 shell and field-mode context.
Three kanban columns replace dashboard content while retaining the same dark visual tokens.
Task cards expose title, assignee, due date, priority, tags, location, and attachments.
Native drag and drop updates card status and column counts immediately.
suggestions: Use this board as the shared visual baseline for list and calendar views.
Open task details in the planned right-side panel during the next iteration.
reasoning: The screen clearly extends FillWork Dashboard v1.0 into project execution, balances office and field context, and provides a usable draggable three-column board with realistic mock tasks.
